reasoning: Based on comprehensive evidence, Taylor Swift's October 2025 album 'The Life of a Showgirl' released October 3 broke multiple Spotify records including most-streamed song in a single day (30M+ streams) and most-streamed album in a single day. With Spotify tracking data through mid-November, Swift gets nearly 6 weeks of this record-breaking activity counted. Bad Bunny had strong 2025 performance with 'Un Verano Sin Ti' hitting 20B total streams, but appears to lack major Q4 releases to counter Swift's surge. Despite earlier betting markets favoring Bad Bunny at 67%, the timing advantage strongly favors Swift. The 45% probability reflects this uncertainty while acknowledging Swift's late-year momentum and record-breaking performance.
